phase.name: Local AI portability and daily-use integration

model_runtime.message: Phase 6 is in progress through IMP-061. Offline Ollama session import, explicit text-only loopback capture, the accepted bounded local-portability migration drill, the deterministic shutdown escape bundle, the bounded selected-history ChatGPT source path, numbered ChatGPT conversation-member aggregation, and bounded imported conversation context replay through a distinct synthetic local target runtime are implemented. PORT-001, PORT-003, the bounded IMP-057 portion of PORT-013, PORT-014, and PORT-015 retain their accepted evidence. The IMP-061 cross-runtime replay extension remains CI-only until separate primary real-machine evidence is accepted. The complete Phase 6 gate, target-specific application replacement, and stable general anti-lock-in remain incomplete.
